---
title: "new_data_investigation"
format: html
---

How does there diet change from juvenile to mature? 

Library 
```{r}
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

Load data 
```{r}
otolith <- read_csv(here::here("data", "WG_Otolith_Data.csv")) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  rename(id_number = number)

stomachs <- read_csv(here::here("data", "White_Grunt Stomachs.csv")) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

morph <- read_csv(here::here("data", "wg_morph_data.csv")) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()
```

Remove extras from otolith and 
```{r}
# Remove extra characters 
otolith$id_number <- sub("/.*| .*", "", otolith$id_number)
otolith$id_number 

otolith$id_number <- as.numeric(otolith$id_number, na.rm = TRUE) # Change types 
```

Wrangle the data
```{r}
# Join data
merged_data <- morph %>%
  left_join(stomachs, by = "id_number") %>%
  left_join(otolith, by = "id_number")


# only include stomach that are not empty 
merged_data <- merged_data %>% 
  filter(is.na(empty))

colnames(merged_data)

# Select necessary columns 
merged_data %>% 
  select(id_number, gender, gonads, crab, shrimp, sediment_rocks, shells, invert_parts, plants_aglae, unknown_mush, fish, eggs, brittle_star, other)

```

Catgeoical Contents of Stomach Findings (%)
```{r}
 
```

Diet composition as diet progressives 
```{r}

```

Sexual Maturity (gavity) -> dietary preferences 
```{r}

```

Gender -> deiart preference 
Portional bar chart 
```{r}

```
